SMILE INDEX: 17
WINDOW: 365.633s to 402.000s (smile at 385.633s to 387.000s)

TRANSCRIPT CONTEXT:
[157.080-434.930] interviewee: So they couldn't refuse it. So they were supposed to take me to the sanitary, to the medical corps, but I don't know if it was on purpose or by mistake, this short name for the medical corps was SAT, Sanitary. When they brought SAP, SAP are the sappers. And I had to serve for two years with the pioneers building bridges

WORDS AT THE SMILE MOMENT:
Sanitary.

context_segments.text: So they couldn't refuse it. So they were supposed to take me to the sanitary, to the medical corps, but I don't know if it was on purpose or by mistake, this short name for the medical corps was SAT, Sanitary. When they brought SAP, SAP are the sappers. And I had to serve for two years with the pioneers building bridges
